phase_name: ad-hoc bug fixes and feature requests

completed_tasks.name: Fix image storage 403 — missing requireTenant on files route
Fix nginx static asset rule intercepting /api/*.jpg URLs (404)
Fix img src / a href not sending Authorization header (401)
Fix DebtDetailPage transaction doc thumbnails (missing AuthenticatedImage)
Add lightbox modal for image thumbnails (open in modal instead of new tab)
Fix clients cache not updating after debt payment mutations
Fix staleTime caching initial error for status=active on clients page

remaining_tasks.name: Add debt payment registration UI — user cannot find where to submit partial/full payment
remaining_tasks.notes: Feature EXISTS at /debts/:id via client detail page — user may just need UX guidance. Check if navigation path is discoverable enough.

remaining_tasks.name: Explain / clarify transaction states (pending_approval vs active) in UI
remaining_tasks.notes: pending_approval = collaborator submitted, awaiting owner. active = owner-approved confirmed transaction.

remaining_tasks.name: Global debts list page — no /debts route exists, only per-client view
remaining_tasks.notes: User wants a register of completed payments (fully_paid debts) across all clients.

remaining_tasks.name: written_off debts hidden from client detail page DebtGroupList
remaining_tasks.notes: DebtGroupList only shows open/partially_paid/fully_paid — written_off group is missing.

human_actions_pending.action: Verify clients page 'Activos' filter now works after staleTime fix
human_actions_pending.context: Hard refresh (Ctrl+Shift+R) may be needed to clear old React Query cache

decisions.decision: AuthenticatedImage component with blob URL fetch instead of query params token
decisions.rationale: More secure — token never in URL. Reusable across all file types.

decisions.decision: Lightbox built into AuthenticatedImage via lightbox prop + createPortal
decisions.rationale: Self-contained — no state prop-drilling to 4 separate pages.

decisions.decision: openAuthenticatedFile() kept for PDFs — opens in new tab via blob URL
decisions.rationale: PDF inline preview in modal is complex; new tab is standard behavior.

next_action: Verify clients Activos filter works. Then decide: (a) add /debts global list page as new phase, or (b) improve discoverability of existing debt payment flow.
context_notes: All image-related bugs fixed across 3 layers: backend auth, nginx routing, frontend auth headers. Remaining work is feature gaps in debt management UX.
